name: veda-brain
description: VEDA Lambda — AI routing engine (AWS Bedrock CRIS + GCP Gemini)

scripts.package: npm install --omit=dev && zip -r veda-brain.zip index.mjs package.json node_modules/
scripts.deploy: npm run package && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name veda-brain --zip-file fileb://veda-brain.zip --region us-east-1
